title: Haya Home 60 μm 120L 20 Extremely Strong Heavy Duty Black Bin Bags Bin Liners Refuse Sacks Waste Dustbin Bags Rubble Sack Industrial Commercial Builders Kitchen Home Office DIY Garden 100% Recycled
description: Performance is not all about the colour and thickness of the bags but resistance against force. British Made bin bag have achieved this by using 100% recycled plastic material (not heavy material such as calcium / Chalk) which add stretch and improve tensile strength to our black bin bags. This allow our bin liner to lift up to 80 Kg of waste material per bin bag without tearing. Why Choose Haya Home bin bags: ✅Haya Home, heavy duty refuse bin liners are British made and are produce with 100% recycled material. ✅SIZE & VARIATIONS FOR BIN LINER: Each heavy duty bin bags roll contains approx 20 recycled plastic black bin bags which are 80 x 100 cm in size. There are 20 'Black Bin Liners' per roll and you will get 20 x 1 black bin bag roll in total bin bags. These are also available in different quantities. ✅Each refuse sack can hold up to approx 120 ltr of waste.. These are ideal to use for commercial builders kitchen, Garden Garbage Trash Rubbish or Industrial waste. ✅Unlike the light duty bin liner, British Made heavy duty black bin bags are made with recycled LDPE. ✅These heavy duty refuse sacks are not weak and therefore, cannot be easily tear and leak which keeps your bin clean and trouble free. ✅Use for everyday household. No more finger popping through the bag. ⚠️Warnings: Very Very Strong, To avoid danger of suffocation, keep these bags away from babies and children. Disclaimer : Due to use of 100% recycled materials, all our bin bags quantity, sizes, weights & thickens are approximate. Standard tolerances are in line with industry standards of +/- 10%.-
